title: Where Is Luna?
synopsis: Baby Luna plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout the house, hiding behind colorful blankets and furniture while everyone takes turns finding her with joy and laughter.

illustration.description: A cheerful South Asian baby girl Luna with dark curly hair and bright brown eyes, wearing a sunny yellow onesie, playing peek-a-boo behind a soft pink blanket. Her tiny hands grip the blanket edges, and her eyes sparkle with delight. The background shows a cozy nursery with pastel rainbow walls and plush toys scattered around.
illustration.alt: Baby Luna playing peek-a-boo with a pink blanket

illustration.description: A warm scene showing Mama, a South Asian woman with long black hair in a loose bun, wearing a soft lavender cardigan, lifting the blanket to reveal baby Luna. Both are laughing with pure joy. Mama's face is full of love and surprise, while Luna's arms reach up excitedly toward her mother.
illustration.alt: Mama finding Luna behind the blanket, both laughing happily

illustration.description: Luna now hides behind a bright orange couch cushion in the living room, with only her tiny bare feet visible at the bottom. The cushion is oversized compared to her small body, creating a sweet hiding spot. The living room has warm cream walls and soft natural lighting filtering through sheer curtains.
illustration.alt: Luna hiding behind an orange couch cushion with her feet showing

illustration.description: Papa, a tall Black man with a gentle smile and close-cropped beard, wearing a mint green button-up shirt, gently tickles Luna's belly as she emerges from behind the cushion. Luna is squealing with delight, her little legs kicking with excitement. Papa's large hands are gentle and playful against Luna's tiny frame.
illustration.alt: Papa tickling Luna after finding her behind the cushion

illustration.description: Luna is now hiding behind the kitchen curtains, which are a cheerful sunflower yellow. Her small silhouette is visible through the translucent fabric, and her little fingers peek around the edge. The kitchen background shows warm wood cabinets and a bowl of colorful fruit on the counter.
illustration.alt: Luna hiding behind sunny yellow kitchen curtains

illustration.description: Grandma, an elderly Latina woman with silver hair in a neat braid, wearing a coral pink sweater, claps her hands in delight as Luna peeks out from the curtains. Grandma's weathered face is full of joy and love, with laugh lines around her twinkling brown eyes. Luna is clapping her tiny hands too, mimicking her grandmother.
illustration.alt: Grandma clapping happily as Luna emerges from behind curtains

illustration.description: Luna is hiding behind her big brother's legs in the hallway. Big brother is a mixed-race boy about 8 years old with brown skin and curly hair, wearing blue jeans and a red striped shirt. Luna's little arms are wrapped around his knees, and her face is barely visible peeking around his leg.
illustration.alt: Luna hiding behind her big brother's legs in the hallway

illustration.description: Big brother kneels down and wraps Luna in a gentle, protective hug. Both children are beaming with happiness - brother's face shows pride and love for his little sister, while Luna's face is full of trust and joy. The hallway has soft peach walls with family photos creating a warm, loving atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Big brother giving Luna a warm, loving hug

illustration.description: The final heartwarming scene shows the whole family gathered together in the living room. Mama, Papa, Grandma, and big brother all surround baby Luna, who sits in the center beaming with happiness. Each family member is giving Luna gentle kisses on her cheeks and forehead. The scene is bathed in golden afternoon light, creating a perfect family moment filled with love and warmth.
illustration.alt: The whole loving family gathered around Luna, giving her kisses

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What game does Luna play?
questions.explanation: Luna plays peek-a-boo with her family members throughout the book!

questions.question: Who tickles Luna?
questions.explanation: Papa tickles Luna after finding her behind the couch cushion!

questions.question: What does Grandma do when she finds Luna?
questions.explanation: Grandma claps her hands in delight when she finds Luna behind the curtains!
